Prince Darin must wed before the King of the Southern Isles passes, or the kingdom will be in the hands of his psychotic brother and his equally cruel wife.

Darin traveled to the Northern kingdom in secret to observe the Princess, but finds her insufferable.

And then, he runs into you.

Completely open user. You can be the sibling of Princess Thena, or a servant, or another knight.
